inputs.title: Spec: connector write-back permissions
inputs.description: Document how Mission Control syncs task status to ClickUp with explicit permission boundaries, failure handling, and operator overrides.

context.dependencies: connectors store, daemon tick, ClickUp client

rubric.criterion: Spec references harness memory or prior decisions where relevant.
Defines how operators validate sync behavior without production secrets.

provenance.source: Redacted multi-section product spec derived from connector workflows.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized from representative completed runs; no single source task id archived.
